steps.code: <?php require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php'; global $wpdb; $wpdb->query("UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_content = REPLACE(post_content, 'http://ep-fitness.local/wp-content/uploads/', '/wp-content/uploads/') WHERE post_content LIKE '%ep-fitness.local%'"); $wpdb->query("UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET guid = REPLACE(guid, 'http://ep-fitness.local/wp-content/uploads/', '/wp-content/uploads/') WHERE guid LIKE '%ep-fitness.local%'"); echo 'URLs updated';
